programmes.show_description: This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Baby Jake Loves Bouncing Apples. The adventures of magical Baby Jake and friends. Baby Jake and Nibbles the Rabbit go on an orchard adventure and enjoy bouncing.
Tepui Mountains, Venezuela. Meet the Go Jetters, four explorers on a global adventure! Glitch and Xuli crash into a sinkhole in Venezuela. Can teamwork catapult them to safety?
Show. Children's animation. Bing and his friends put on a show in the park. After Coco's dance, Pando's song and Sula's acrobatics display, everyone is excited to see Bing's finale.
Magic Show Day. Love Monster hogs the limelight at a magic show by performing three tricks instead of one.
Rock-a-Bye Bo. Bo is tired and falls asleep in the middle of hunting for Fabio's lost inflatable fruit. It's up to Mojo to finish the job - without waking up poor, exhausted Bo!
Out in the Cold. When a snow storm comes to Chuggington, Wilson and Brewster get caught out in the cold and must work together to make their way home.
Night Lights. A lost baby Bokchoydaktyl is guided down to safety by Ginger and the Pea-Rexes, with help from some light-up Vegesaurs.
Runner Beans. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the speedy dancing Runner Beans, who won't stand still for even one minute.   Followed by My Petsaurus.
Dragon Boat Beats. It's Supertato versus Evil Pea in the Dragon Boat Race on Ice. On your marks, get set, go!
Plasters. Children's animation. Bing sees Coco with a plaster on her finger and wants one too. Bing makes one out of sticky tape, but it is too sticky.
PJ Party. Bing is sleeping at Sula's house but has forgotten Hoppity!
The Hat Badge. Duggee and the Squirrels introduce King Tiger to lots of different hats and explain what they might be good for. But none of them feels right to him.
Betty's First Day. The Squirrels are having fun trying out games but are surprised to find out that Betty didn't always enjoy playing.
The Jigokudani Monkey Park, Japan. Animated adventure comedy series. The Go Jetters fly to the rescue in Japan, as Glitch gets up to his usual monkey business.
The Tale of the Runaway Kites. Animated series. Benjamin's up in the air as the unwilling passenger of a flyaway kite.
The Crafty Cuttlefish. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. The Octonauts are on a mission to recover Captain Barnacles's lost octo-compass.
Cherry Picker! The town's ferris wheel is stuck, so Mojo and Bo have to get it moving. But they do their job too well, because the wheel rolls away, forcing Mojo and Bo to chase it down.
Three Lions. Theo goes to get a new ball and thinks he's found a lion.
Counting. Educational series using Makaton sign language. Mr Tumble counts fish with Fisherman Tumble, while Justin and his friends count animals at a wildlife park.
Horsey Ride. When Bluey forgets to put her favourite toy away, cousin Socks grabs it and won't let go!
Musical Statues. Bluey and her family are out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.
The Favourite Badge. The Squirrels learn what a favourite is but can't decide on their own choices.
The Topiary Badge. After seeing Duggee's topiary skills, the Squirrels are keen to try it out for themselves.
The Crustacean Vacation. The Piris help a tricky family of touring crabs, but will they be happy with their visit?
The Day We Lost Rex. Rex is missing, but Dad, Cosima and Big Lizard need him to save them from a giant slug!
Honeycomb. The children are in the meadow. The Nogglins discover a land of hexagons, and everywhere looks the same. Itty leads the way, but can she find a route back?
Popcorn. A young Cornasaurolophus starts popping, which draws the attention of the Bananaraptors!
The Boreal Forest, Canada. Meet the Go Jetters, four explorers on a global adventure! Glitch travels to Ontario to find a new teddy bear, but things start to go very wrong.
Mission Sculpture. The ducklings get creative and make sculptures of themselves out of straw. Weasy thinks he can do better, but his sculpture is a fiasco.
Treehouse Takeover/Incredible Shrinking Zola. Villains become dinos. Zola hides in Aunt May's house.
Pink Fairy Armadillo. The Octonauts protect some creatures from getting wet when the rain shadow effect fails.
Detective. There is a phantom knitter decorating the town's buildings with supersize creations! Stanley and Fifi play detective to solve all the clues and discover who's behind it all.
Keep Your Cool. Evil Pea's plans keep failing because Supertato makes her lose her temper. Mummy and Daddy Pea pay a visit to teach her how to keep her cool.

programmes.show_name: New: Talking Tom Heroes: Suddenly Super
programmes.show_description: The Great Hero Competition. Many problems appear at once in Peak City, so the team split up to cover the rescues.
Ants! It's picnic day! Rebecca and Murphi create a 'soup-er' fly in a bowl of soup. On the Recycling Express, an old storage tub becomes a totally terrific tub drum kit.
The Pipe-Playing Piper. Children's cookery series. Small has a new recorder but is having trouble learning how to play it. Jen and Small cook the Pied Piper something tasty and tuneful.
Puddles. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out all about puddles.
Tuatara and Burrowing Owl. Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet two amazing animals and reveal a surprising connection between them in the wild. This time, it's tuataras and a burrowing owl.
Waffle's Keepy Uppy. Competitive Mrs Hobbs joins balloon keepy uppy, but Waffle's bottom bounce wins the day.
The Acorn Badge. Animated preschool series. Norrie is sad when she sees a falling leaf, until she learns that some trees shed their leaves in autumn. But ouch! What has Roly found?
Fiddler Crabs. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. The Octonauts help clean up a beach after a storm.
Popcorn Gets Wheel Tired. After Popcorn runs on his hamster wheel all night, he's cranky the next day. Will he nap?
Table Mountain, South Africa. Animated adventure comedy series. Glitch wants to ski, so the Grimbots give Table Mountain a snowy peak, which threatens its rare plants.
The Do It All Wish. Rafi's wish to be in two places at once leads to mix-ups. She realises it's better to focus on one thing at a time.
Daffodil Day. It's the first day of spring, so it's time for the traditional march round the garden to greet the daffodils. But none of the gang can remember the right tempo to march to.
Cabbage. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the marvellous Cabbage and his dazzling super-veggie memory skills!
Paints and Pottery. Justin and his friend get creative with paint at a pottery cafe. Artiste Tumble also has an arty day, painting a portrait of Tumble Ted.
Our Environment. Toddlers and their grown-ups explore our environment, sing songs and share a story.
The Palorchecies. Kiri is sad when Lou goes away to a private meeting of his species, the Palorchecies. So she decides to follow him.
The Giggle Sprouts. Brian calls the Piggies to help set up his annual Giggle Sprouts party. Everyone is excited and thinks opening the pot will be easy - but it is actually impossible!
Sunny's Big Feelings. Sunny wants to win a box car race but doesn't feel like his team is taking it seriously.
Spinny Disc. Preschool animation about a baby monkey and his mother. Tee and Mo find that the garden isn't big enough for a game of Spinny Disc.
The Planet of Colours. The Game Catchers land on the Colour Planet to play a game called find the pair.
The Following Forest. Ginger and the Pea-Rexes help an Asparagusaur, and it starts following them everywhere.
Singer. Dylan wants to rock out at a concert, but getting to the stage on time is a lot harder than he thought!
Ice Cream Float. Betty's ice cream is lifting everyone off the ground. Mojo and Bo need to get them down.
Peak City Invasion. Aliens invade Peak City, and everyone is ready to fight - except Tom, who is scared!
Bird Bath. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers learn why bird baths are helpful for birds. They make their own by recycling old items.
When You Wish Upon a Whale. Norman misses his whale friends. The Piris try to help, but his size proves a challenge.
Hollywood, USA. When the Go Jetters star in a Hollywood movie, they must save a world-famous landmark.
The Daring Young Man on the Flying Trapeze. Bobbles goes to the circus to see a talented man on a trapeze.
Dad's Discovery. Whilst searching for new discoveries, a rockfall traps Dad, Cosima and Big Lizard in a cave. Just when all is lost, Dad finally discovers a new species!
The Cherry Tree Wish. Rafi's cherry tree grows too fast. She discovers nature likes to take its time.
Nikhil and Jay and the Birthday Huff. It's Max the cat's birthday, but Nikhil and Jay are in a huff with each other. Amma and Appa try to get them to say sorry, but it is just too hard.
Dance Mode. After Dad eats her last chip, Bingo gets three chances to put Mum and Dad in 'dance mode'.
It's Time for a Roller Disco. JoJo is learning to roller skate, but there's not enough room. Time for a Gran Gran plan!
Camera. Animation. Sarah and her best friend Duck embark on simple but exciting adventures. Today, they attempt to take photographs of birds.
You Won't Like This Present as Much as I Do. Children's animation with the siblings. Lola buys Lotta the perfect birthday present but finds it difficult to part with it.
Everything Smells Lovely. In the little Toy House, Pepi Nana shows everybody a book about the rain. In Storyland it's raining, so all of the friends share the umbrella.
Catch. A frustrated BaBa wants to catch a ball, so MeMo tries to teach BaBa. With eyes open and concentrating hard, BaBa eventually catches some seeds knocked over at Yummy Time.
Upsy Daisy's Big Loud Sing Song. Series for young children about a magical place. Upsy Daisy sings through her megaphone. The Pontipines cover their ears - what loud singing!
Ellie Goldstein - This Is Me. Ellie Goldstein reads an uplifting story celebrating difference, individuality and being proud of who you are.
This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Baby Jake Loves to Copy You. The adventures of magical Baby Jake and friends. Baby Jake and Sydney the Monkey go on a tropical adventure and play copying.
Go Jet Academy: Biogas Power. Meet the Go Jetters, four explorers on a global adventure! Glitch causes chaos at the academy when he loses control of his new biogas boosters.
Nicky. Bing shows Sula's cousin how to voosh a toy car down a slide - but then things go wrong.
Treat Your Friends Day. Love Monster treats his friends to a spa day but wants them to relax quicker.
Dino Dig. Mojo's got the perfect top for digging up the bones of a Swoppitus Rex. But could an actual dinosaur still be alive under Jackson's field, or is it a case of mistaken identity?
Wilson's Wag-a-Lagon. Will Wilson roll with his long-trusted wagon until the wheels fall off, or can his chuggtastic friends convince him to retire 'wag-a-lagon' before it's too late?
Treetops. Ginger is stuck in a tree, so the Pea-Rexes seek the tallest Vegesaurs to rescue her.
Strawberry. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Strawberry performing See the Seeds!   Followed by My Petsaurus.
How to Be a Supertato. In Tato Tower, Supertato shows the Grape Kids a film on how to be a Supertato like him.
Cat. Children's animation. Bing loves Arlo the cat and knows just where he likes to be stroked and what games he likes playing. Bing spots a new cat but this one isn't so friendly.
Hose Pipe. Bing turns the garden hose on too fast, turning it into a big snake!
The Choreography Badge. The Squirrels have a dance-off with Chippo and the Rock Slippy Crew.
The Pet Badge. The Squirrels meet a Scrufflelump in the woods, and despite Duggee's reservations, take him in. But they soon learn the responsibilities of taking care of a pet.
The Nazca Lines, Peru. Animated adventure comedy series. The Go Jetters race to protect ancient artwork in Peru when Glitch erases the Nazca Lines.
The Tale of the Hero Rabbit. Animated series. Benjamin gets more than he bargained for when a band of desperate mice mistake him for a hero.
The Lost Lemon Shark. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. The Octonauts have their hands full as they look after a headstrong young lemon shark.
Top Fun. Preston needs Mojo's racer top speed to get his new plane off the ground. But when his flight goes wrong, Mojo and Bo have to take to the air in Mojo's jet top to help him down!
The Sack. The Fantastics playfully sack Georgie. Jaz is appointed as the team's new coach but finds it harder than she thought. Georgie tries her hand at other jobs - with chaotic results.
Wet and Dry. It is raining inside Mr Tumble's house!
Hotel. Bluey and Bingo run a crazy hotel, with Dad as their put-upon guest. But when Bingo quits over Bluey being too controlling, Dad needs to teach them the importance of compromise.
Stories. Indy's upset her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up.
The A Cappella Badge. The Squirrels are inspired to learn how to sing a cappella style after hearing a famous bird quartet singing in a nearby tree.
The Babysitting Badge. Duggee has a job to do outside the Clubhouse, but who will look after the Squirrels? King Tiger, of course, since he has his babysitting badge!
The Emperor's New Feathers. The Emperor Piri needs help when he gets locked out of the lookout without his feathers.
How to Speak Lizard. Cosima and Big Lizard don't need to speak the same language to understand one another.
Red Onion. Everyone's busy in the kitchen. The Nogglins discover a race track. Ready, steady, go! Fidd is the fastest, but can Nono keep up?
Minty in the Sky. Minty soars over the valley on a baby Bokchoydactyl's back.
Timgad Ruins, Algeria. Meet the Go Jetters, four explorers on a global adventure! The Go Jetters visit Timgad in Algeria, but someone is playing games with their click-ons.
Mission Birthday Present. Weasy has forgotten the ducklings' birthday! Can he make amends?
Moon Girl and the Dino Dilemma/Hulk's Squirrely Switch. Spidey meets Moon Girl. Hulk becomes a squirrel.
Flooded Forest. When a hoatzin's eggs go missing in the Amazon, the Octonauts work to get them back.
Treat. It's Stanley's birthday, so the town throws him a surprise party. He gets a special gift - Jose and Peggy will take on all his jobs for the day!
Corn's Mutiny. When Evil Pea gets frozen in ice, Corn decides to take over and become Evil Corn.

programmes.show_name: New: Talking Tom Heroes: Suddenly Super
programmes.show_description: Kranium Strikes Again. Angela and Tom must work together - even though they've been annoying each other all day.
Hide-and-Seek. Murphi is so good at hiding that Rebecca decides to make a cardboard tube tracker dog. The Recycling Express brings a shoebox, which becomes home to a magnificent monster.
Billy Goats. Small is guarding her final biscuit, but Jen wants to eat it too!
Blackbirds. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out all about blackbirds.
Bactrian Camel and Lynx. Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet two amazing animals and reveal a surprising connection between them in the wild. This time, it's the Bactrian camel and the lynx.
We're All Potatoes at Heart. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. Potatoes from around the world celebrate the similarities and differences we all share.
Waffle the Cheerleader. Mrs Hobbs's tidy up activity turns into cheerleading chaos when Waffle runs off with a pompom. Once the hall is clean, Evie leads a cheerleading finale.
The Balloon Badge. Animated preschool series. Something unexpected happens when Duggee gives Tino the mouse some birthday balloons.
Manta Rays. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. The Octonauts help a young manta ray find the secret manta ray feeding grounds.
Sunny's Baby Sister Surprise. When Sunny meets his new baby sister, he's disappointed that she can't play all the games he had planned. But Vida knows just what to do.
The Northern Lights, Finland. Animated adventure comedy series. Ubercorn is excited to see the northern lights, but Glitch's Grunge-Grimbler covers them with smoke.
The Tallest Wish. Seeing herself small in a family photo makes Rafi wish to be taller. She realises growing up fast isn't necessary, and the best memories are made together.
Slime Sisters. The sensational singing snail sisters take a wrong direction and end up in the garden.
Pig. Preschool series about animals that live together on a patchwork blanket. Patchwork Pig doesn't want to shower! Will the Patchwork Pals find a way to help him?
Boating Fun. Justin and his friend head to a marina for lots of boating fun. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble has ordered a new inflatable boat to take fishing. What could possibly go wrong?
In the Air. Nigel, Benjee Bear and Bailee Bear help little ones and grown-ups to explore 'in the air'.
Shine Your Light. Kiri and Lou fall down a hole into a cave and are guided to safety by some singing glow-worms.
Piggy Busy Day. The neighbours secretly prepare a party for the Piggies.
Pippen's Stuffed Up. Pippen is ready to sing at her concert - until her cold threatens to ruin the performance.
Grumpy. Preschool animation about a baby monkey and his mother. Tee wakes up in a grumpy mood. How is Mo going to cheer Tee up and get him to eat breakfast?
Snowy Tic-Tac-Toe. The Game Catchers arrive on a Christmas-themed planet to play super tic-tac-toe.
Slippery Skins. Bananaraptors shed their skin and become soft and limp, which is anything but intimidating!
Plumber. Dylan the plumber wants to keeps the pipes clear, but Ozzy's hat falls in, so they have to work extra hard to get it out!
Who Duggit? A mystery is afoot! Somebody's been digging up and running off with Jackson's giant vegetables. Detectives Mojo and Bo must follow the clues to the cagey culprit.
More Chase, Less Speed. To save a giant art project from The Rakoonz, Angela must pilot the upgraded EGGcelerator.
Wildlife Corridor. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers learn why wildlife corridors are important for the environment and search for some in a public garden.
Five Piris and a Little Egg. The Piris look after a special package for Shirley but get more than they bargained for.
Fatberg, London Sewers, England. The Grimbots accidentally block London's sewers with a huge fatberg.
My Grandfather's Clock. Aimee and Nadeem perform the traditional 'My Grandfather's Clock' in British Sign Language, accompanied by animations of Bobbles dressed up as a grandfather clock.
The Missing Volleyball. Twig steals Cosima's volleyball. A chase leads Big Lizard and Cosima to her den... and also to a happy discovery!
The Mermaid Wish. Rafi's mermaid wish helps Jake find his courage, and they have a fun underwater tea party.
Nikhil and Jay and the Pirate Treasure. Nikhil and Jay look for some lost treasure to decide who is the best pirate captain.
Hammerbarn. On a trip to Hammerbarn, Bluey and Bingo create their own mini-homes side-by-side in the trolley. But Bluey quickly gets jealous of her neighbour Bingo.
It's Time to Make a New Game. JoJo and Raya play snakes and ladders, but think it would be fun to make a new game.
Tapping Shoes. Animation. Sarah and her best friend Duck embark on simple but exciting adventures. Sarah needs some new shoes, but picks out a very unusual pair.
I Must Take Completely Everything. Children's animation with the siblings. Lola packs everything she can find for a sleepover, but disaster strikes when she forgets the suitcase.
Tidying Up. Inside the little Toy House, everybody is sharing a book with pictures of tidy things. When Pepi Nana suggests making everything in the Toy House tidy, they all set to work.
Spinning. MeMo and BaBa want to spin without stopping. On Planet BeddyByes, they discover many spinning things and learn why taking breaks can be useful.
Playing Hiding with Makka Pakka. Series for young children about a magical place inhabited by toy characters. The Tombliboos have discovered a new game, hiding in the garden.
Justin Fletcher - Incredible You. Justin Fletcher shares a beautiful story celebrating how our differences make us special.
